details.productUrlName: Jinnie Fay Jetmirs Second Display Commander Thick Stock

customAttributes.description: This card is significantly thicker than a standard MTG card and may not be playable. If you would create one or more tokens, you may instead create that many 2/2 green Cat creature tokens with haste or that many 3/1 green Dog creature tokens with vigilance.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Raffine, Xander, Falco, Ziatora, Jetmir—heel!" // "Mister Mittens, you would not be-lieve the day I had."

details.productName: Jinnie Fay, Jetmir's Second (Display Commander) - Thick Stock

formattedAttributes.Description: This card is significantly thicker than a standard MTG card and may not be playable. If you would create one or more tokens, you may instead create that many 2/2 green Cat creature tokens with haste or that many 3/1 green Dog creature tokens with vigilance.
